title: rubus mexicanus
intro: Rubus mexicanus, also known as the Mexican raspberry or Mexican wineberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus mexicanus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and lower cholesterol levels. Rubus mexicanus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and it is also used in jams and jellies due to its sweet and slightly tart flavor.
